seo.title: UL Listed Wholesale Signs — Trade Pricing, Safety Certified | Sunlite Signs
seo.metaDescription: Every illuminated sign from Sunlite Ships UL listed — available exclusively to wholesale trade accounts. Sign shops get certified products at trade pricing with zero retail competition.

de.title: UL-zertifiziert Großhandel Signs — Trade Pricing, Safety Certified | Sunlite Signs
de.metaDescription: Every illuminated sign from Sunlite Ships UL-zertifiziert — available exclusively to Großhandel Händlerkonten. Schilderwerkstätten get certified products at Händlerpreise with zero retail competition.

data.subtitle: Safety is not an upgrade or an add-on. Every illuminated sign that leaves our wholesale facility carries UL certification. For your shop, that means code compliance, reduced liability, and a certified product at trade pricing that you can install with confidence and mark up with pride.
data.image: UL certification label on Sunlite channel letter

de.subtitle: Safety is not an upgrade or an add-on. Every illuminated sign that leaves our Großhandelsanlage carries UL certification. For your shop, that means code compliance, reduced liability, and a certified product at Händlerpreise that you can install with confidence and mark up with pride.

data.heading: What UL Listing Actually Means
data.content: UL listing is not a self-certification or a paper exercise. It involves rigorous third-party testing by Underwriters Laboratories. As your wholesale sign partner, we handle the entire certification process — you just install and sell.
data.image: UL testing laboratory and inspection process

de.heading: What UL Listing Actually Means
de.content: UL-Zertifizierung is not a self-certification or a paper exercise. It involves rigorous third-party testing by Underwriters Laboratories. As your Großhandel sign partner, we handle the entire certification process — you just install and sell.

data.heading: Why UL Listing Matters for Your Trade Business
data.description: UL certification is not just about the product. It directly impacts your shop's ability to win bids, reduce liability, and build a reputation as a premium sign shop partner.

items.title: Code Compliance for Your Clients
items.description: Most municipalities require UL listed electrical signage. As your wholesale partner, our certification means your installations meet code requirements from day one — helping you win bids and avoid costly rejections.

items.title: Reduced Liability for Your Shop
items.description: UL listing provides documented third-party verification of product safety. When you source wholesale from Sunlite, you have independent certification backing every product you install.

items.title: Win Bigger Projects
items.description: Property managers, franchise owners, and corporate clients demand UL listed signage. Our wholesale trade pricing on certified products positions your shop to compete for — and win — premium contracts.

items.title: Electrical Safety Guaranteed
items.description: UL testing verifies that electrical components, wiring, and connections meet strict safety standards. Every sign we ship to our trade partners has been validated for proper grounding, insulation, and thermal management.

de.heading: Why UL Listing Matters for Your Trade Business
de.description: UL certification is not just about the product. It directly impacts your shop's ability to win bids, reduce liability, and build a reputation as a premium Schilderwerkstatt partner.

items.title: Code Compliance for Your Clients

items.title: Win Bigger Projects

data.heading: UL Listed vs. Non-Certified Signs
data.content: The difference between certified and non-certified products is not abstract. For your trade business, it has real consequences on every installation.

de.heading: UL-zertifiziert vs. Non-Certified Signs
de.content: The difference between certified and non-certified products is not abstract. For your trade business, it has real consequences on every installation.

data.heading: Our UL Compliance Process
data.content: UL listing is built into every stage of our wholesale manufacturing process. From approved component sourcing to final electrical testing, our trade partners receive a fully certified product every time. We handle the certification — you handle the client relationship.
data.image: Electrical testing and safety verification at Sunlite facility

de.heading: Our UL Compliance Process
de.content: UL-Zertifizierung is built into every stage of our Großhandelsfertigung process. From approved component sourcing to final electrical testing, our Handelspartner receive a fully certified product every time. We handle the certification — you handle the client relationship.

data.heading: Get Your Product
data.description: Ready to put our complimentary engineering services to work on your next project? Send us your details and receive a detailed wholesale quote within 48 hours.

de.heading: Starten Sie Ihr
de.description: Bereit, unsere kostenlosen Konstruktionsleistungen für Ihr nächstes Projekt einzusetzen? Senden Sie uns Ihre Details und erhalten Sie ein detailliertes Großhandelsangebot innerhalb von 48 Stunden.
